overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage following a character through a desert canyon settlement with salt evaporation pools, stone structures, and tents. The scene features warm golden hour lighting and ancient Egyptian architecture, ending with an approach to an NPC working at the salt flats.

agents.ego_description: following a character along a sandy path through a canyon settlement with salt pools visible to the left

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the path toward the canyon interior

entered.detail: shallow pools with white salt crust edges and greenish water reflecting sunlight
tall layered sedimentary rock walls with warm orange and tan striations
large wooden wheeled cart loaded with hay or straw bundles

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a character through a desert canyon settlement. Salt evaporation pools with white crusted edges line the left side of the path, while massive layered rock formations rise on the right. A large wooden cart loaded with hay sits on the path ahead as the camera maintains a steady walking pace through the warm afternoon light.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canyon path with stone walls and wooden barriers

events.description: moving from open salt flat area into narrower canyon section with stacked stone walls

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding canyon path, passing stone construction walls on the left

notable_agents.action: walking ahead through the stone-walled canyon passage

entered.detail: stacked stone construction walls with white salt deposits at the base
leafless gnarled tree trunk against the rock face
low wooden fences and posts along the path edge

segments.scene_description: The path narrows as the camera moves deeper into the canyon, passing the wooden cart and leaving the salt pools behind. Stacked stone walls appear on the left, while a dead tree stands out against the rock face on the right. The environment becomes more enclosed with towering rock formations now directly ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: tented settlement area with fabric canopies

events.description: entering a tented area with fabric canopies and wooden support posts

agents.ego_description: walking through a settlement area with red and orange fabric tents, approaching wooden walkways over salt pools

notable_agents.action: walking ahead through the tented passage toward the salt pools

entered.detail: red and orange fabric canopies supported by wooden poles creating shaded areas
plank walkways and bridges crossing over the salt evaporation pools
returning view of salt pools with wooden channels and white crystalline edges

segments.scene_description: The camera passes through a settlement area with colorful fabric tents and wooden posts. Salt evaporation pools reappear on the left, now featuring wooden walkways and channels for water management. The path leads through the tented area toward an expansive salt flat terrace with intricate pool patterns.

scene_state.functional_zone: salt evaporation terraces with wooden infrastructure

events.description: entering the main salt flat area with extensive terraced pools and wooden walkways
slowing down as approaching the NPC working near the stone containers

agents.ego_description: walking through the salt pool terraces and approaching a worker kneeling beside stone containers

notable_agents.action: kneeling and working with woven baskets, handling salt or minerals

entered.detail: rectangular stone or wooden bins filled with round white salt cakes
large woven baskets on the ground next to the working NPC

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals an expansive salt flat terrace with dozens of interconnected evaporation pools reflecting the golden sunlight. The camera moves past wooden walkways and approaches an NPC kneeling beside stone containers filled with salt cakes, working with woven baskets. The scene ends with a close view of the salt harvesting activity and the intricate patterns of the crystalline pools.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desert canyon settlement that gradually opens into an expansive salt harvesting terrace. It begins by following a character past white-crusted evaporation pools and massive layered rock formations, moving steadily toward a wooden cart loaded with hay. As the path narrows and the environment becomes more enclosed by towering rock faces and stacked stone walls, the camera pushes deeper into the canyon before emerging into a settlement area filled with colorful fabric tents. The scene then expands as the camera passes wooden walkways and water channels, leading out toward a vast terrace of interconnected crystalline pools reflecting the golden sunlight. Finally, the movement slows as it approaches an NPC kneeling beside stone containers and woven baskets, focusing on the intricate patterns of the salt flats.
